name: set_layout_sizing
description: Set horizontal and vertical sizing modes for an auto-layout frame in Figma

nodeId.description: The ID of the frame to modify

layoutSizingHorizontal.description: Horizontal sizing mode (HUG for frames/text only, FILL for auto-layout children only)

layoutSizingVertical.description: Vertical sizing mode (HUG for frames/text only, FILL for auto-layout children only)
